text: esc in a modal should close the modal. childs that handle esc should stop() event bubbling. write UI tests for that to prevent regression.
description: aim add/edit modal, phase add/edit modals.

reflections.context: Implement Esc-to-close behavior for aim add/edit and phase add/edit modals, with child controls that own Escape preventing propagation.
reflections.outcome: Updated FormModalShell to prevent and stop Escape after closing, updated PhaseCreationModal key handling to consume Enter/Escape, preserved AimCreationModal textarea-local Escape behavior, and added focused regression specs for shared shell, aim creation/edit, and phase creation/edit flows.
reflections.effectiveness: Focused component tests caught an event propagation edge in the description textarea test path, which led to a more explicit capture handler and clearer coverage.
reflections.lesson: For modal keyboard behavior, test both shell-level Escape and child-owned Escape paths; Vue Test Utils trigger events and native dispatch cover different parts of the behavior, so combine them carefully.
reflections.pattern: Small shared modal behavior changes are safest when paired with specific modal usage tests.

status.comment: Implemented shared modal Escape propagation handling, tightened phase modal key handlers, and added focused regression coverage for aim add/edit and phase add/edit modal Escape behavior.
